modules.name: solana.rpc.types
documentation: RPC types.

variables.name: solana.rpc.types.URI
documentation: Type for endpoint URI.

variables.name: solana.rpc.types.RPCMethod
documentation: Type for RPC method.

variables.name: solana.rpc.types.Commitment
documentation: Type for commitment.

variables.name: solana.rpc.types.Finalized
documentation:
The node will query the most recent block confirmed by supermajority of the cluster as having reached maximum
lockout, meaning the cluster has recognized this block as finalized.

classes.name: solana.rpc.types.RPCError

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.RPCError.code
documentation: HTTP status code.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.RPCError.message
documentation: Error message.
RPC error.

classes.name: solana.rpc.types.DataSliceOpts

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.DataSliceOpts.offset
documentation: Limit the returned account data using the provided offset: <usize>.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.DataSliceOpts.length
documentation: Limit the returned account data using the provided length: <usize>.
Option to limit the returned account data, only available for "base58" or "base64" encoding.

classes.name: solana.rpc.types.MemcmpOpts

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.MemcmpOpts.offset
documentation: Offset into program account data to start comparison: <usize>.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.MemcmpOpts.bytes
documentation: Data to match, as base-58 encoded string: <string>.
noqa: A003
Option to compare a provided series of bytes with program account data at a particular offset.

classes.name: solana.rpc.types.TokenAccountOpts

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TokenAccountOpts.mint
documentation: Public key of the specific token Mint to limit accounts to.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TokenAccountOpts.program_id
documentation: Public key of the Token program ID that owns the accounts.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TokenAccountOpts.encoding
documentation: Encoding for Account data, either "base58" (slow) or "base64".

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TokenAccountOpts.data_slice
documentation: Option to limit the returned account data, only available for "base58" or "base64" encoding.

Options when querying token accounts.

Provide one of mint or program_id.

classes.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts.skip_confirmation
documentation:
If false, `send_transaction` will try to confirm that the transaction was successfully broadcasted.

When confirming a transaction, `send_transaction` will block for a maximum of 30 seconds. Wrap the call
inside a thread to make it asynchronous.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts.skip_preflight
documentation: If true, skip the preflight transaction checks.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts.preflight_commitment
documentation: Commitment level to use for preflight.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts.max_retries
documentation:
Maximum number of times for the RPC node to retry sending the transaction to the leader.
If this parameter not provided, the RPC node will retry the transaction until it is finalized
or until the blockhash expires.

class_variables.name: solana.rpc.types.TxOpts.last_valid_block_height
documentation:
Pass the latest valid block height here, to be consumed by confirm_transaction.
Valid only if skip_confirmation is False.
Options to specify when broadcasting a transaction.
